scripts.build:fc: esbuild src/server-fc.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --outfile=fc-dist/index.cjs --external:pg-native && printf '#!/bin/bash\nexec node index.cjs\n' > fc-dist/bootstrap && chmod +x fc-dist/bootstrap && cd fc-dist && rm -f clarityloop-fc.zip && zip -q clarityloop-fc.zip bootstrap index.cjs
